def normalize_name(name):
    # Correct: transformation logic is extracted into a single helper function
    return name.strip().lower().replace("_", " ")

def process_user_data(raw_data):
    return {"name": normalize_name(raw_data["name"])}

def process_admin_data(raw_data):
    return {"admin_name": normalize_name(raw_data["full_name"])}
